narrative_seed_by_week.8: Embeddings hands-on: use the TensorFlow Embedding Projector to compare domain-specific word clusters / Similarity scoring: compute cosine similarity between 5 sentence pairs using pre-computed vectors / Evaluation metrics deepdive: precision vs recall trade-off — when does recall matter more than precision? / Confusion matrix in practice: given a 20-row classification table, compute accuracy, precision, recall, F1 / Calibration: does the model’s confidence match its actual accuracy? / Domain evaluation plan: which statistical measure will you use to evaluate your Capstone system?

lab_activity_seed_by_week.8: Embedding explorer: pick 10 domain words; plot 2D projections; identify clusters and outliers / Confusion matrix exercise: given a 20-case table, compute all four metrics by hand / Calibration check: run a 10-question quiz with Claude; record confidence vs actual accuracy / Domain evaluation plan: write a one-page evaluation design — metric, test set size, pass threshold / Journal Entry #4
